title: Come Play With Us
lesson: Inviting someone who is alone to join in makes everyone happier.
prompts: In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands facing {GENDER_F_AGE_06} and tosses one colourful ball through the air between them, with a happy expression. {GENDER_F_AGE_06} reaches both hands toward the single ball, catching it while laughing. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. If a prop is shared, show one shared prop linking their hands in one common space. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, holding the colourful ball in both hands and pausing, with a thoughtful, caring expression, looking toward the bench. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. If a prop is shared, show one shared prop linking their hands in one common space. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, golden afternoon light — three children stand side by side in a single row, lightly arm in arm, all facing the camera and grinning. From left to right: first the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image, with a warm, proud smile; then {GENDER_F_AGE_06}, with a bright, happy grin; then {GENDER_M_AGE_06}, with a cheerful, included smile. Exactly three children in total, each a single distinct child — no fourth child, no duplicate or extra child, no twin. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. If a prop is shared, show one shared prop linking their hands in one common space. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: At a sunny playground with a wooden bench, the child tosses a colourful ball while a girl catches it, laughing — the child plays with a friend.
At the playground, the child pauses holding the ball with a thoughtful, caring look, noticing a boy who sits alone on the bench in the background, looking sad and left out.
At the playground, the child walks toward the bench with a friendly smile and a welcoming reaching hand while the lonely boy looks up hopefully — inviting him.
At the playground, the child holds hands with the boy, who now smiles and rises from the bench — he's been invited in.
At the playground, the child claps and laughs joining the game while the girl and the boy play together with the ball — everyone included.

At the playground in golden light, three children stand side by side arm in arm in a row — the child, then the girl, then the boy — all grinning, exactly three with no duplicates. Including everyone made the best day.
texts: {NAME} was at the playground, tossing a ball with a friend. "Catch!" called {NAME}. "Got it!" laughed the girl. They both giggled.
Then {NAME} saw a boy sitting all alone on a bench. He looked sad and left out. "He has no one to play with," thought {NAME}.
{NAME} walked right over with a friendly smile. "Come play with us!" said {NAME}, reaching out a hand. "Me?" said the boy, hopeful.
His face lit up, and he took {NAME}'s hand and stood up. "Yes please!" he said. "Now you have friends too!" said {NAME}.
{NAME}, the girl and the boy all played together with the ball. "This way!" "Over here!" they called. Nobody was left out, and everyone was happy.
{NAME} wrapped both arms around the two friends. "Best friends!" said {NAME}. Including everyone had made the very best day.
